svg.text: 当前实现结构
目标结构
Source 入口 chat attachment -> accepted source
Resource / Blocks / Batches prepare_source_resource split_resource_blocks split_block_batches
Extraction Candidates entities / assertions / relations evidenceAnchors / sectionCandidates / topicHints
Section 归并层 section 是插入单位 已有 body / entityIds / assertionIds / evidenceAnchorIds
Topic Host 层 resolve_topic_hosts 当前 host resolve 输入 = section
Wiki 写入层 build_topic_insertion_plan draft_knowledge_page apply_draft_upsert
Graph / 回源读路径 source-grounded ingest 可写 topic / section / evidence / source read_wiki_page -> read_raw_source
当前缺口 没有 taxonomy resolve / audit / write 也没有 entity/assertion/relation 的 durable write
Source 入口 上传 / 注册 / 识别 / source overview 目标入口仍然是 source
Topic 规划层 先从 source 总览拿候选 topic reuse existing or create new
Taxonomy 树层 root new node generation leaf attach node merge
Section 贴源层 source chunks -> section body 正文贴近原文，而不是摘要壳
挂载层 topic / taxonomy / parent section 共同决定 section 最终落点
Graph 语义层 entity / concept / assertion / relation durable write + link
Source Anchor / Provenance locator / excerpt / source path section 可定位回 source
Wiki + Graph Projection 可读 / 可写 / 可审 / 可回跳 agent 沿 topic -> section -> source anchors -> source 读取
section grounding
taxonomy 未接入
graph durable write 未完成
topic -> taxonomy planning
section anchors
assertion / relation evidence
section grounding
taxonomy 未接入
graph durable write 未完成
